data.name: customSqlQuery1.Sql
data.value:
SELECT tab_data.item_type_name ,tab_data.money_type_id ,tab_data.item_type_id ,sum(tab_data.principal_amount) as principal_amount ,sum(tab_data.interest_amount) as interest_amount ,sum(tab_data.item_amount) as item_amount
from ( /* à§Ô¹¡Ùé */ SELECT sc_com_m_receipt.branch_id, sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date, sc_lon_m_rule.account_id, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item , sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type as item_type_id , ( select old.loan_type_description from sc_lon_m_rule old where old.loan_type = sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type ) as item_type_name , sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.type_pay_money as money_type_id , sum( sc_com_m_receipt_item.principal_amount ) as principal_amount , sum( sc_com_m_receipt_item.interest_amount ) as interest_amount , sum( sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount ) as item_amount
FROM sc_com_m_receipt, sc_com_m_receipt_item, sc_lon_m_contract, sc_lon_m_rule, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type ,sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid WHERE ( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no ) and ( sc_com_m_receipt.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type ) and ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id ) and ( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status = '0' ) AND ( sc_lon_m_contract.create_loan_status = '1' ) AND ( sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item = 'LON' ) and sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no and sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.seq_no = 1 and sc_lon_m_rule.invest_status = '0' GROUP BY sc_com_m_receipt.branch_id, sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date, sc_lon_m_rule.account_id, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item , sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type, sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.type_pay_money union all
SELECT sc_com_m_receipt.branch_id, sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date, sc_lon_m_rule.account_id, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item , sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id as item_type_id , sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_name as item_type_name , sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.type_pay_money as money_type_id , sum( sc_com_m_receipt_item.principal_amount ) as principal_amount , sum( sc_com_m_receipt_item.interest_amount ) as interest_amount , sum( sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount ) as item_amount
FROM sc_com_m_receipt, sc_com_m_receipt_item, sc_lon_m_contract, sc_lon_m_rule, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type ,sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid WHERE ( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no ) and ( sc_com_m_receipt.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type ) and ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id ) and ( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status = '0' ) AND ( sc_lon_m_contract.create_loan_status = '1' ) AND ( sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item <> 'LON' ) and sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no and sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.seq_no = 1 and sc_lon_m_rule.invest_status = '0' GROUP BY sc_com_m_receipt.branch_id, sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date, sc_lon_m_rule.account_id, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item , sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id , sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_name , sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.type_pay_money
) tab_data , sc_fin_m_close_day ,sc_acc_m_account_master ,sc_com_m_ucf_money_type
where 1=2 /*WHERE*/ --and sc_acc_m_account_master.account_id = :as_accid GROUP BY tab_data.group_item ,tab_data.money_type_id ,tab_data.item_type_name ,tab_data.item_type_id order by tab_data.group_item desc ,tab_data.item_type_id
